user_story: As a Finance admin, I want to view the finance email templates list, so that I can see the configured finance emails
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Finance Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As a Finance admin, I want to open and view the Finance Email template, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the finance email templates are listed; When I click View on the Finance Email row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As a Finance admin, I want to refresh the finance email templates list, so that I always see up to date data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Finance Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As a Finance admin, I want to cancel out of the finance email templates screen, so that I can return to the previous page
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Finance Email Templates screen; When I click Cancel; Then I am navigated away
